question: The eunuch who went to Jerusalem to worship in Acts 8:27 was a

question: God blessed and hallowed the seventh day because

option.a: it was the day He rested from creation
option.b: it was the day He created man
option.c: He wanted it to be a day of worship
option.d: He saw that all He had created was good.

question: Which of the following was not part of the honour done to Joseph when Pharaoh made him a ruler in Egypt?

option.a: Joseph was made to address the people
option.b: The land of Goshen was given to Joseph
option.c: Joseph was dressed in garments of fine linen
option.d: A gold chain was put around Joseph’s neck.

question: “The Lord forbid that I should give you the inheritance of my fathers”. The inheritance referred to here is
Jeremiah said the people of Judah were in a state of mourning because,

option.d: there was drought in the land.

question: When Saul disobeyed God’s command, Samuel rebuked him by saying that

option.a: the sword would never depart from his house
option.b: to obey was better than sacrifice
option.c: he should fear the LORD and obey the people’s voice.
option.d: though he was little, yet he was the head.

option.b: Go ye into the world and exercise full authority over

question: Pilate referred Jesus to Herod for trial because

option.a: Pilate and Herod were good friends
option.b: Jesus did not cooperate with Pilate.
option.c: Jesus lived in the jurisdiction of Herod.
